title: Hiranandani Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hiranandani Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!
